word: G3513 - νή - nḗ - nay - I protest by

sections.paragraph:
- Original: νή

- Transliteration: Ne

- Phonetic: nay

- Definition:

1. by

a. used in the affirmations of oaths

- Origin: probably an intensive form of G3483

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Probably an intensive form of G3483; a particle of attestation (accompanied by the object invoked or appealed to in confirmation); as sure as: - I protest by.
